codeReview.summary: All typecheck issues in e2e test files were correctly fixed. Changes include: (1) Removed unused `token` variable assignments in settings-model-comprehensive.spec.ts and settings-stt-comprehensive.spec.ts by removing the `const token =` prefix; (2) Fixed test.skip() calls to use boolean first argument `test.skip(true, reason)` instead of just `test.skip(reason)` for proper Playwright TypeScript overload compatibility; (3) Fixed waitForRequest timeout syntax from positional argument `waitForRequest(callback, 10000)` to options object `waitForRequest(callback, { timeout: 10000 })`; (4) Fixed beginSession() calls in sessionStore.test.ts to take no arguments (method signature is `() => Promise<void>`). All fixes are correct implementations, not workarounds.

sharedStateObservations.observation: The handoff mentions that chat-input-expand.spec.ts remains untracked due to Droid-Shield blocking a commit (password pattern detected), but the typecheck passes for this file. This is a non-blocking discovered issue noted by the worker. No action required from scrutiny since typecheck passes.

summary: Review passed. Fixed pre-existing typecheck issues in 3 files: (1) settings-model-comprehensive.spec.ts - 9 test.skip fixes and 2 unused variable fixes; (2) settings-stt-comprehensive.spec.ts - 6 test.skip fixes, 2 unused variable fixes, and 1 waitForRequest timeout syntax fix; (3) sessionStore.test.ts - 7 beginSession argument fixes. Typecheck now passes (verified: npm run typecheck exit code 0). Lint also passes. All fixes are correct, not workarounds. One non-blocking note: chat-input-expand.spec.ts remains untracked due to Droid-Shield but typecheck passes for it.
